extract: Urshifu (Japanese: ウーラオス Wulaosu) is a Fighting-type Legendary Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII in The Isle of Armor. It evolves from Kubfu when exposed to the scroll in one of the Towers of Two Fists. The form Kubfu evolves into depends on the scroll it chooses. In its Single Strike Style, it is dual-type Fighting/Dark. Kubfu evolves into this form when exposed to the Scroll of Darkness in the Tower of Darkness. In its Rapid Strike Style, it is dual-type Fighting/Water. Kubfu evolves into this form when exposed to the Scroll of Waters in the Tower of Waters. (Refer to Game data→Evolution data for more details.) Urshifu has two Gigantamax forms, one for each style. It can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Urshifu if it has the Gigantamax Factor. Urshifu is the game mascot of The Isle of Armor, appearing on the boxarts of the Pokémon Sword and Shield Expansion Pass.
